title: Breach Swords
description: A datapack which enables swords to use the breach enchantment
body:
![The enchantment is fully accessible through enchanting table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6d3bf0a6c77383f605b472cdb1ed136b4e58cee.png)

The breach enchantment is such an interesting enchantment, this mod allows the player to apply the breach enchantment to their swords. Simple but effective.

This mod/datapack is fully compatible with any other mods or datapacks (I use Easy Magic to re-roll the enchantment [https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic))
